rows.label: tev030701_JNK0010
rows.name: Inquire[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev030701_SEL0011
rows.name:
Ask Zullaniky about the
Ma-non's arrival on Mira.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev030701_JNK0020
rows.name: Discuss[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev030701_SEL0021
rows.name: Ask Zullaniky about recent developments.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev030701_SEL0031
rows.name: Ask Zullaniky about the enemy attack.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev030701_SEL0041
rows.name: Ask Zullaniky about recent developments.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev030701_SEL0051
rows.name:
Ask Zullaniky for
information on Overeds.

rows.label: tev030701_SEL0061
rows.name:
Ask Zullaniky if he's heard
any interesting rumors.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev030701_MSG0001
rows.name:
All we were hoping for was a nice,
peaceful voyage through space, you see?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev030701_MSG0002
rows.name:
But then something went horribly wrong, and we got
dumped on this freak show of a planet with indigens
on one side and and and the Growth on the other![ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev030701_MSG0003
rows.name:
If you hadn't have come along, we'd
probably be in really serious trouble?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev030701_MSG0004
rows.name:
We're just not as good at starting and
fighting wars as you guys, you know?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev030701_MSG0011
rows.name:
Have you ever heard of
of Miralife Cards?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev030701_MSG0012
rows.name:
They're these super awesome collectible
cards with pictures and cool little factoids
about all the indigens on Mira, you see?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev030701_MSG0013
rows.name:
They sell them in packs of five, okay?
Oh, and there are rare gold cards that
are kind of hard to come by...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev030701_MSG0014
rows.name:
I guess it's tough to collect
all of them without a little
help from friends, right?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev030701_MSG0023
rows.name:
It seems many people were concerned
that the enemy managed to get
inside NLA, were they not?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev030701_MSG0024
rows.name:
But so long as we have our technology
and your courage, there's nothing
to worry about, correct?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev030701_MSG0025
rows.name:
The universe may be big, but nothing
out there is a match for the old
Ma-non-BLADE tag team combo, am I right?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev030701_MSG0026
rows.name:
It's only a matter of time
before we wipe the floor with
these Growth losers, isn't it?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev030701_MSG0030
rows.name:
Those Miralife Cards are really taking
NLA by storm, don't you think?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev030701_MSG0031
rows.name:
My favorite is Series 17: Bio-behemoths! It
includes these awesome "Real Aprica" cards
that everyone is going wild for, you know?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev030701_MSG0032
rows.name:
Apparently if you collect them all and lay
them out in the the right order, you can
actually re-create a life-sized aprica?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev030701_MSG0033
rows.name:
With my luck, I'll probably
still be be trying to complete
the set a century from now...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev030701_MSG0042
rows.name:
I heard you bumped into some
kind of "chimeroid" in the
Central Life, did you not?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev030701_MSG0043
rows.name:
Well, there's apparently some manner of
insanely powerful chimeroid hiding out
in Nightglow Forest's Vitriol Cesspool?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev030701_MSG0044
rows.name:
Be a real BLADE and go go find
out what it is. You know—so they
can make a new Miralife Card?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev030701_MSG0049
rows.name:
Right now, the talk on our ship is
all about the dangerous incidents
that have been happening, okay?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev030701_MSG0050
rows.name:
You'll just be be hanging around, doing some
work outside, when suddenly some sniper
decides to shoot at you... So scary, right?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev030701_MSG0051
rows.name:
But Heradot went out to work
anyway, because I guess she's
not not scared? Talk about guts![ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev030701_SEL1021
rows.name: Ask Zullaniky about recent developments.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev030701_MSG0052
rows.name:
I think I'm jealous of
Heradot right now?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev030701_MSG0053
rows.name:
She takes one lousy bullet, and
everyone starts lavishing her
with with pizza? Unbelievable![ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev030701_MSG0054
rows.name:
Maybe I should go go get shot
so people help me complete my
Miralife Card collection.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev030701_MSG0055
rows.name:
...What's that? You already
defeated the enemy? But how am
I going to get sympathy-shot now?[ST:wait ]
